query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "qwen-image-agent: bridging the context gap in real-world image generat" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it directly addresses the core mechanism of "bridging the context gap" in real-world image generation by proposing an agentic pipeline for world-grounded synthesis, which is the specific technical problem the user's follow-up research aims to extend. It measures the same dependent variable (quality of real-world image generation involving long-tail concepts) using the same domain (multimodal agents) as the user's referenced work.
